fields.name: Default Value
fields.tooltip: Specifies another value than the data in the field that will be exported, because you selected the Use Default Value check box. This field is only relevant for export.

fields.name: Source
fields.tooltip: Specifies the XPath to the XML node that must be mapped to the specified field in Microsoft Dynamics 365.

fields.name: Caption
fields.tooltip: Specifies the caption of the field in Dynamics 365 that the node in the currency exchange rate file must map to.

fields.name: Transformation Rule
fields.tooltip: Specifies a rule for transforming imported text to a supported value before it can be mapped to a specified field in Microsoft Dynamics 365. When you choose a value in this field, the same value is entered in the Transformation Rule field in the Data Exch. Field Mapping table and vice versa.
